name: china-southern-power-grid-mcp
description: 南方电网账户查询服务，支持零依赖 MCP 服务端和零依赖 Skill 包。

scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build:mcp && pnpm run build:skill
scripts.build:mcp: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); fs.mkdirSync('mcp',{recursive:true}); for (const name of fs.readdirSync('mcp')) { if (name !== '.csg') fs.rmSync(path.join('mcp',name),{recursive:true,force:true}); }" && esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=mcp/server.cjs
scripts.pack:skill-local: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src='.csg'; const dest='skills/china-southern-power-grid-stat/scripts/.csg'; if (!fs.existsSync(src)) { console.error('未找到 .csg 用户配置目录。请先运行 pnpm run login。'); process.exit(1); } fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true}); console.log('本地专用 Skill 脚本目录已包含 .csg 凭证。请勿发布或分享。');"
